prose: Fukui reactivity analysis of furan was computed using **DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit)** in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (for the neutral parent) with N±1 states (cation at +1/mult 2, anion at −1/mult 2). The geometry was the user-supplied furan.xyz structure, used as-is without re-optimization. Mulliken charge analysis was used to compute the Fukui indices f⁺, f⁻, and f⁰, as well as the dual descriptor Δf. SCF converged; charge conservation checks passed (sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000). The most electrophilic site is C at position 5 (f⁺ = 1.9243), and the most nucleophilic site is also C at position 5 (f⁻ = 0.1616). The engine reports integrity status `ok` with `trustworthy: true`. A visualization plot was generated and saved to the agent's output directory.
